case_title: MENA, FRANCISCO XAVIER vs. ARVAN, CHRISTIAN ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENA, FRANCISCO XAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT ARVAN, CHRISTIAN ANTHONY DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-20-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-22-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-03-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-20-1996, CONTINUED TO OCT-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR DISMISSAL. IF A PAYMENT PLAN PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING WHEN THE LAST PAYMENT WILL BE MADE AND WHEN A DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-21-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OSC TO PLAINTIFF ALSO AS TO WHY NO DISMISSAL FILED OR NO CRC 525 STATING WHEN LAST PAYMENT WILL BE MADE AND WHEN DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED. HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
